summary: Add a net command that collapses per-group balances into the fewest per-counterparty transfers.
reason: Splitwise tracks balances per-group, so per-group settle-ups can require multiple transfers with the same person. net reads the already-netted friend balances plus each friend's per-group groups[] array to produce one transfer per counterparty and report the savings vs per-group settle-ups. Plan-only in v1.
validated_outcome: go build/vet/test pass; computeNetPlan unit tests cover per-currency netting, savings count, and direction; verify-skill passes.
